## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the use case that motivates this request.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you would like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have already considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references that might help clarify the request.
